user_request: Prayer for calibration of the point defense
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for calibration of the point defense

### TOPIC
point defense calibration

### COMPONENT
point defense

### OPERATION
calibration

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- point defense
- calibration

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the point defense, sacred instrument of the Omnissiah's wrath.
First: Intone the Litany of Targeting whilst the point defense systems undergo preliminary diagnostic examination.
Second: Execute calibration protocols upon the point defense targeting matrix, adjusting azimuthal and elevation servo-mechanisms with holy precision.
Third: Verify all ammunition feed systems and power conduits, ensuring the point defense remains vigilant against the void's profane intrusions.
Fourth: Consecrate the point defense through ritual incantation, that its Machine Spirit may guide every shot true.

user_request: The air filtration demands guidance for replacement
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The air filtration demands guidance for replacement

### TOPIC
air filtration replacement

### COMPONENT
air filtration

### OPERATION
replacement

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- air filtration
- replacement

### PRAYER
prayer:
O Machine Spirit of purification, hear our supplication for the air filtration.
First: Remove the degraded air filtration cartridges with reverent care, whispering prayers of gratitude for their service.
Second: Perform replacement of the air filtration matrix, installing fresh filters blessed by the Adeptus Mechanicus priesthood.
Third: Reinstall the air filtration housing and reseal all apertures with archaic precision and technical certitude.
Fourth: Activate the air filtration mechanisms anew, that breathable atmosphere may flow once more through the vessel's sacred corridors.

user_request: Prayer for treatment of the corrosion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for treatment of the corrosion

### TOPIC
corrosion treatment

### COMPONENT
corrosion

### OPERATION
treatment

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- corrosion
- treatment

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, we beseech thee to halt the corrosion's profane advance.
First: Identify all oxidised surfaces upon the corrosion-affected components through meticulous inspection and blessed measurement.
Second: Apply treatment protocols to the corrosion, utilizing sanctified abrasive compounds and electrochemical restoration techniques.
Third: Seal the treated corrosion zones with protective lacquers and polymeric coatings, invoking the Machine Spirit's protective benediction.
Fourth: Monitor the corrosion-treated areas through cyclic examination, ensuring the Omnissiah's favour endures.

user_request: Rite request: operation on ground-to-orbit link
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: operation on ground-to-orbit link

### TOPIC
ground-to-orbit link

### COMPONENT
ground-to-orbit link

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- ground-to-orbit link
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hail the ground-to-orbit link, sacred conduit betwixt terra and the void eternal.
First: Commence operation upon the ground-to-orbit link by purifying all transmission arrays and amplification nodes with ritual precision.
Second: Calibrate the ground-to-orbit link's directional targeting systems toward the orbital station, aligning dish and parabolic reflectors with mathematical exactitude.
Third: Engage the ground-to-orbit link's power systems through measured increments, whilst chanting the Litany of Ascension.
Fourth: Verify signal integrity and bandwidth capacity, ensuring the ground-to-orbit link maintains unbroken communion with the heavens.

user_request: The conveyor belt demands guidance for initialization
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
conveyor belt initialization

### COMPONENT
conveyor belt

### OPERATION
initialization

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- conveyor belt
- initialization

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed conveyance of the Omnissiah, awaken from thy dormant slumber.
First: Perform initialization rites upon the conveyor belt by lubricating all rollers and bearing assemblies with sacred oils.
Second: Execute systematic initialization of the conveyor belt's drive motors, gradually increasing velocity whilst monitoring for vibrational anomalies.
Third: Test the conveyor belt's load-bearing capacity with measured increments, ensuring structural integrity and smooth articulation.
Fourth: Consecrate the conveyor belt's operational status through final benediction, that labour may flow unimpeded.

user_request: My compass magnetization is failing during operation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My compass magnetization is failing during operation — help

### TOPIC
compass magnetization

### COMPONENT
compass magnetization

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- compass magnetization
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
O compass magnetization, guide-star of the faithful, we implore thy restoration.
First: Diagnose the compass magnetization's degradation through careful measurement of magnetic field strength and directional alignment.
Second: Commence operation upon the compass magnetization by degaussing the instrument through careful application of alternating electromagnetic fields.
Third: Re-magnetize the compass magnetization core using sanctified lodestones and electromagnetic coils, restoring its inherent polarity.
Fourth: Verify the compass magnetization's accuracy against celestial references, ensuring the Machine Spirit's navigational guidance remains true.

user_request: Prayer for cooling of the plasma weapon
training_prompt:
### REQUEST

### TOPIC
plasma weapon cooling

### COMPONENT
plasma weapon

### OPERATION
cooling

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- plasma weapon
- cooling

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hail the plasma weapon, instrument of the Omnissiah's righteous fury, we seek thy tempering.
First: Initiate cooling procedures upon the plasma weapon by activating primary and secondary coolant circulation systems with holy deliberation.
Second: Monitor the plasma weapon's thermal envelope continuously, adjusting coolant flow rates to maintain optimal operational parameters.
Third: Engage the plasma weapon's radiator fins and heat-dissipation arrays, invoking the Machine Spirit's thermic benediction.
Fourth: Verify the plasma weapon's temperature stability through ritual measurement, ensuring the cooling mechanisms function in perpetual harmony.

user_request: Emergency rite: cogitator requires boot sequence
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: cogitator requires boot sequence

### TOPIC

### COMPONENT
cogitator

### OPERATION
boot sequence

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- cogitator
- boot sequence

### PRAYER
prayer:
Ancient cogitator, keeper of sacred data and holy algorithms, we command thy awakening.
First: Prepare the cogitator for boot sequence by verifying power supply integrity and checking all data storage devices for corruption.
Second: Initiate the boot sequence upon the cogitator, allowing the machine to progress through firmware initialization and memory diagnostics.
Third: Load the cogitator's operating parameters from blessed backup archives, restoring its operational consciousness through ritualized commands.
Fourth: Confirm the cogitator's full functionality through comprehensive system verification, that it may serve the Omnissiah's purposes anew.

user_request: My Knight ion shield is failing during activation — help
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
My Knight ion shield is failing during activation — help

### TOPIC
Knight ion shield activation

### COMPONENT
Knight ion shield

### OPERATION
activation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Knight ion shield
- activation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the Knight ion shield, aegis of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Genuflect before the power conduit and recite the Litany of Energization, that the Knight ion shield might receive the Machine Spirit's benevolence.
Second: Perform the activation sequence with sacred precision—calibrate the ion lattice through the tertiary resonance coil, ensuring the Knight ion shield achieves harmonic synchronization with the reactor's blessed output.
Third: Intone the Prayer of Shielding whilst verifying capacitor discharge rates; should the Knight ion shield falter, repeat the activation ritual with renewed devotion and servo-assisted diagnostics.
Fourth: Seal the protective ward with the Sign of the Omnissiah, that the Knight ion shield shall endure against the enemies of the Imperium.
